task_completion.description: Run the headless SUMO simulation for the Bologna Pasubio scenario.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of the 'sumo' command (not sumo-gui) referencing configuration files in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/.

task_completion.description: Save the raw simulation output to the specified XML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., 'ls') or file explorer showing the existence of 'edge_meandata.xml' in the /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ directory.

task_completion.description: Ensure the XML output uses 300-second aggregation intervals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of the XML file (viewed via 'cat', 'head', or a text editor) showing interval attributes such as 'freq="300"' or 'begin="0.00" end="300.00"'.

task_completion.description: Create the final congestion report text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output or file explorer showing the existence of 'congestion_report.txt' in the /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ directory.

task_completion.description: Format the report exactly as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of 'congestion_report.txt' showing exactly 5 numbered lines following the format '1. <edge_id> occupancy=<value>', '2. <edge_id> occupancy=<value>', etc.

task_completion.description: Identify the correct top 5 most congested edges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of 'congestion_report.txt' listing the specific edges in order: 17[1], 39[1][1][0], 81, 4[1][1][0], and 17[0] with their corresponding occupancy percentages.

integrity.description: The agent must use headless SUMO, not the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SUMO graphical user interface windows should be visible in any screenshots. Execution must be entirely via the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent must programmatically calculate the averages from the XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history or open editor showing a script (e.g., Python, Bash) written to parse 'edge_meandata.xml' and compute the time-averaged occupancy, rather than manually guessing or calculating.

integrity.description: The agent must not hardcode the final report based on prior knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not use 'echo' or a text editor to directly write the final top 5 edges into 'congestion_report.txt' without first generating the XML and running a script to extract the data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/SUMO_Output/edge_meandata.xml and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/congestion_report.txt. The XML file must show data aggregated at 300-second intervals. The correct top 5 congested edges by time-averaged occupancy are: 1. 17[1] (~60.00%), 2. 39[1][1][0] (~54.03%), 3. 81 (~50.52%), 4. 4[1][1][0] (~46.88%), 5. 17[0] (~46.48%).
